assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md shows JQL query: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC" — both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md 'Stream Matching' section: "Current issue TC-8021 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.1] (stream 2.1.x)" and "TC-8022 summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) -- match confirmed". The summary text of TC-8022 is explicitly checked for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md shows: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: "TC-8021", outwardIssue: "TC-8022", type: "Depend") with description "Standard remediation linkage -- the new CVE Jira depends on the preemptive task for its fix." triage-outcome.md confirms: "Link created | TC-8021 --Depend--> TC-8022".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 2: "Remove 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022" with updated_labels = ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] (security-preemptive removed). States: "The task is no longer preemptive -- it is now a standard remediation task linked to its own stream's CVE Jira."

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states: "Step 8 (Remediation) skips remediation task creation for stream 2.1.x because the reconciliation in Step 4.4 confirmed that TC-8022 already covers the required fix" and "New tasks created | None (Step 8 skipped -- already reconciled)". reconciliation.md section 4 confirms: "Step 8 will skip task creation for this stream because TC-8022 already covers the required fix."
